hero.subtitle: Hi, I'm Waleska — and I invite you to
hero.headline: Elevate your
hero.p1: Makeup is more than just colors and products — it's an expression of self, a celebration of confidence, and a tool to enhance natural beauty. The art of makeup isn't about masking; it's about revealing, enhancing, and empowering.
hero.p2: True beauty lies in the details — the gentle highlight that catches the light just right, the soft blend of tones that complement natural features, the perfectly sculpted brows that frame a face with elegance.

blockTwo.heading: The Subtle Art of Elevating Women's Beauty Through Makeup
blockTwo.p1: Each stroke, blend, and finish is carefully curated to reflect personality, mood, and moment. A dewy glow for effortless elegance, a bold lip to make a statement, a sultry eye that captivates with mystery — makeup transforms, but never overpowers.
blockTwo.p2: At its core, makeup is about empowerment. When a woman feels beautiful, she radiates confidence from within. The way she carries herself, the way she smiles, the way she steps into the world — it's all touched by the power of artistry.
blockTwo.p3: Beauty isn't created — it's revealed. And makeup, when done right, is simply the brushstroke that highlights the masterpiece that already exists.

blockFour.heading: Discover the perfect shade tailored to your unique skin tone
blockFour.p: Finding the perfect shade isn't just about color — it's about harmony. The right shade enhances your natural complexion, bringing out your unique beauty while complementing your undertones. Whether you're looking for a flawless foundation match, a radiant blush, or the ideal lipstick, our expert selection ensures a seamless, natural finish that elevates your look effortlessly.

blockFive.heading: Always ahead with the latest trends, expert techniques, and flawless styles to create stunning, timeless looks.

items.title: Bridal & Special Events
items.desc: Timeless elegance for your most unforgettable moments.

items.title: Editorial & Fashion
items.desc: Bold, artistic, and trendsetting looks for high-end shoots.

items.title: Everyday Glam & Soft Beauty
items.desc: A luminous, natural glow for any occasion.

blockSix.heading: About Waleska
blockSix.p1: Enhancing beauty, embracing confidence. Waleska is a professional makeup artist passionate about bringing out the natural beauty in every client. With a refined touch and a keen eye for detail, she transforms makeup into an elevated art form, ensuring you feel confident, radiant, and empowered.
blockSix.p2: Whether it's for a wedding, special event, editorial shoot, or a personalized makeup session, Waleska tailors each look to perfection, reflecting your unique style.
bullets: Skin-first techniques for seamless, luminous finishes.
Timeless bridal to bold editorial — always modern and refined.

items.title: Bridal & Wedding Makeup
items.desc: Look flawless on your big day with long-lasting, waterproof bridal makeup that enhances your features while feeling light and comfortable. Tailored trial sessions to find your perfect look.

items.title: Editorial & Photoshoots
items.desc: High-definition, camera-ready looks for fashion, beauty, and commercial projects. Creative, artistic designs that stand out on any platform.

items.title: Special Events & Glam Makeup
items.desc: Red-carpet inspired makeup with luminous skin, sculpted features and refined details. Long-wear, comfortable looks perfect for any celebration.

items.title: Makeup Lessons & Consultations
items.desc: One-on-one tutorials to master techniques, product selection and application tips tailored to your face shape, undertone and style.

blockEight.p: Let's bring your dream look to life! Whether it's for a wedding, an event, or a personal beauty refresh, Waleska is here to create something magical just for you.
